n: 2026-04-11 run: Fixed VARIETAL_WORDS multi-word line-break normalization bug (issue #655). Root cause: normalize_spelling used Regexp.union with literal spaces, so line-wrapped phrases like 'copyright\nowner' failed to match. Fix: iterate VARIETAL_WORDS with \s+ flexible whitespace pattern. Added bsd-3-linebreak-owner fixture. PR creation and #655 comment queued in outputs.jsonl. Monthly summary #974 updated. No new contributors. Open issues all have RA comments. PRs #982 #983 + new VARIETAL_WORDS PR pending review. Next: check PRs #982 #983 CI status, continue scanning issues from #951. Bundle cmd: /usr/bin/bundle3.2 config set --local path /tmp/gh-aw/agent/bundle && /usr/bin/bundle3.2 install
